title: Kaaal
overview: Anil , Ganesh , Rahul and Yogesh are four youngsters who make video's of ghost and post in on their social media page.But have never recorded videos related to paranormal activity.Mr Deshmukh offers the youngsters to shoot at a farmhouse in remote Konkan village.Which is where the boys will face real horror.
